global_visual_rules.style_direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Action playbook layout with numbered step cards, priority markers, and clear decision paths. Feels like a field guide, not a report.
must_have: ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure
flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy
layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art
section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid)
must_avoid: busy ornamental textures that reduce readability
style drift between cover and inline images
paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks

cover_image.purpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance.
cover_image.concept_summary: 你花三周做好的产品路线图，可能在下一次模型升级之后就失效了。这不是夸张，这是当前AI产品经理面对的日常。
scene_elements: one focal visual occupying roughly 60-70% area
icon-based metaphor instead of literal screenshots
clean title zone with breathing room
visual momentum from old frame to new frame
key_relationships: present one question and one promise
make the article worth clicking in one glance
make the core judgment visible within one glance
show one tension and one payoff only

on_canvas_text.headline: PRD写完就过期，产品经理的
on_canvas_text.subheadline: 你花三周做好的产品路线图，可

composition.diagram_focus: time-shift and logic-shift, not feature listing

visual_constraints: prefer conceptual composition over decorative scene rendering
preserve warm off-white background and restrained accent colors
negative_constraints: do not mimic generic social banner aesthetics
avoid full-image text walls or dense annotation
cover_image.prompt_seed: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Style profile: baoyu-cover-image: editorial-infographic (conceptual + warm + hand-drawn). Cover should feel like an editorial infographic hero image with calm hand-drawn confidence. Action-playbook: warm light base, orange for action steps, blue for context. Numbered cards with priority markers. Field guide feel. Apply baoyu-cover-image preset editorial-infographic with conceptual composition. Apply hand-drawn organic line quality with controlled imperfection and cl…

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.placement_rule: Insert near the start of framing to reset attention at this section transition.
scene_elements: two-column contrast with one takeaway strip
key_relationships: make the before/after or old/new contrast obvious
show why one example proves the point

on_canvas_text.headline: 你花三周做好的产品路线…

visual_constraints: maintain same house style as cover
support section transition and comprehension reset
negative_constraints: no decorative image blocks without structural meaning
inline_images.prompt_seed: Use the example_comparison grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 你花三周做好的产品路线图，可能在下一次模型升级之后就失… Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: versus (comparison + vector-illustration). Use comparison-matrix thinking: align differences by one common axis.

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.concept_summary: 传统PM工作流的设计前提是：**软件开发周期长、成本高、中途调整代价大**。所以必须先把规划做扎实，才能启动开发。这套逻辑在过去二十年里是合理的。
inline_images.placement_rule: Insert near the start of section_02 to reset attention at this section transition.
scene_elements: numbered step modules with directional arrows
one icon per stage for quick recognition
visual_constraints: maintain same house style as cover
support section transition and comprehension reset
negative_constraints: no decorative image blocks without structural meaning
inline_images.prompt_seed: Use the workflow_map grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 为什么「先规划再执行」的逻辑正在断裂 Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: process-flow (flowchart + notion). Apply process-flow preset: flowchart logic with Notion-style clean spacing.
